name: How do I file a workers comp claim after falling off ladder at work?
description: Report to employer ASAP, file state form, get medical care, lawyer up for best results.

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim after falling off ladder at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to employer ASAP, file state form, get medical care, lawyer up for best results.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Notify your employer orally and in writing within 30 days (Utah) or 60 days (Idaho), then file Form 1 with the state commission.**[1][6]

The employer/insurer investigates; if approved, benefits start; if denied, request a hearing.

- Get medical treatment on approved providers.
- Keep records of all communications and expenses.
- Ladder defects or improper setup strengthen claims.[2][7]

Hire an attorney early—they take cases on contingency (no upfront fees) and increase settlement value by 40% on average.

Most claims resolve without court, but pros handle disputes.
